deviceFilter.label: Optional device filter / device ID
deviceFilter.help: Comma-separated device serial numbers or device IDs. Leave empty to include all devices.

temperatureUnit.label: Temperature unit
temperatureUnit.help: Select the unit shown in ioBroker. Dreo heater API values are usually Fahrenheit and are converted when Celsius is selected.

debugMode.label: Debug mode
debugMode.help: Enables more verbose Dreo API logging without logging passwords or full access tokens.
